title: tRESP Grid Supply Point (GSP) Areas
description: A Geographic Information System (GIS) file with the tRESP Grid Supply Point (GSP) areas used to define the tRESP Pathways. Definitions of feeding areas per GSP from DNOs may not be split by licence area, may have gaps/ overlaps when aggregated to Great Britain, and may vary over time with changes in normal network running arrangements, but the tRESP GSP areas define the interpretation for the tRESP outputs.
